title: Fabric Unleashed : Automation
description: a performance focused automation modpack centered around create
body:
Welcome to Fabric Unleashed.

A performant and optimized modpack experience for players who revel in the art of automation and complex machinery! Centered around the Create mod, challenge your ingenuity, resourcefulness, and architectural prowess by immersing you in a world where every contraption you can imagine is buildable.

In Fabric Unleashed : Automation, the Create mod takes center stage, enabling you to harness the power of mechanical components like cogwheels, conveyor belts, clutches, gearshifts, and much more. Start your journey by learning the basics of rotational power and expand your empire by constructing elaborate processing lines and ingenious contraptions that seem to come alive with a life of their own.

But that's not all—your automated adventure is complemented with a host of other mods chosen specifically to enhance the Create experience. Interact with mods that introduce new resources, power generation, and storage solutions. Manage your inventions with advanced control systems, and even dive into the realms of magic to bring a spark of the arcane to your industrial wonders.

Key features of Fabric Unleashed include:

- A curated selection of mods that synergize with Create to offer seamless and expansive gameplay.
  
- Most of the best performance improving mods to keep the factory running at or above 60fps
     
- Custom world generation that provides the perfect landscape for your engineering feats, complete with rich ore deposits and unique biomes to explore.

So, suit up, grab your engineer's toolkit, and prepare to lose yourself in a world where the only limit is your imagination. Your automated empire awaits!
